case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. RACHEL L. MANISCALCO

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MANISCALCO, RACHEL L. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-05-2013
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MANISCALCO, RACHEL L.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLT; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; CAUSE OF ACTION FOR EACH CAUSE; DECL FOR REDUCTION OF FILING FEE; DECL PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); AND ADR PACKET, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC SERVED AUG-29-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANISCALCO, RACHEL L.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANISCALCO, RACHEL L. $2,770.23 PRINCIPAL, $291.84 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,062.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
